name: stablecoin-treasury-yield
description: Treasury and idle-balance yield for businesses: quantify idle-float opportunity against live rates, prove it with a $10 real-money probe entirely in-conversation, then map non-custodial integration patterns. For payment companies, on/off-ramp providers, wallets, PayFi apps, and corporate treasuries (idle balance, float, settlement liquidity, retention, 沉淀资金).
